message: This conveyor has been down for 3 days. Motor hums but shaft doesn't turn. Running a Baldor 15HP.
My boss is threatening to write me up if this PowerFlex 40 line doesn't run by end of shift. Shows F4.
Hi, I'm new to this facility and don't really understand these drives. The display shows OC and the motor stopped.
I've been working on this motor for 6 hours straight. F2 fault on the drive keeps coming back after reset.
Fourth time this month this drive has faulted. Same OC fault every time. Siemens SINAMICS G120.
My maintenance manager says it's definitely the motor that failed. I don't think it's the motor. GS20 VFD, OL fault.
It's 3am, night shift, I'm the only one here. VFD on pump 3 keeps tripping OV fault every 20 minutes.
Quick question — what does parameter P044 do on a PowerFlex 525?
Hello I just started working here last week and I don't know much about motors. The motor isn't starting and I don't know where to begin.
PF40 OC trip at 125% FLA. Accel ramp 10s, load is centrifugal pump. P036 at 150. Happened twice in 48hrs.
What causes a VFD to overheat?
PowerFlex 40 showing F4 overcurrent. What should I check first?
Motor tripped on thermal overload. What's the next step?
Contactor chatters when energized. What's wrong?
How do I set the accel time on a GS20 drive?

senior_message: PF525 OC trip. P036=150, ramp=8s, 10HP pump. Happened after motor swap.
junior_message: Hi, I have a PowerFlex 525 drive and it shows an overcurrent fault. The motor was just replaced. I'm not sure what to check. Can you help?

senior_message: Motor megger test: phase-phase 500V DC, getting 2 MΩ L1-L2, 18 MΩ elsewhere. New motor, never run.
junior_message: Hello, I tested the motor with a megohmmeter and got different readings between the wires. One pair shows 2 megaohms and the rest show 18 megaohms. Is this normal for a brand new motor?

senior_message: GS20, OV fault, 480V input, no braking resistor, decel 3s, 20HP centrifugal fan.
junior_message: I have an AutomationDirect GS20 drive that shows an overvoltage fault whenever I slow the motor down. The motor is driving a big fan. I don't understand why it faults when stopping.

senior_message: 3RT2 contactor, 120VAC coil, chattering on energize. Bus voltage 118V, measured at coil terminal.
junior_message: I have a contactor that makes a buzzing noise and kind of flickers when it's supposed to be on. The coil is 120 volts AC. Everything worked fine until today.

senior_message: CompactLogix 1769-L33ER, solid red FAULT LED, no I/O comms, last change was adding a 1769-IF4 module.
junior_message: My Allen Bradley PLC has a solid red light on the front that says FAULT. It stopped communicating with everything. The only thing we did recently was add a new input card to the rack.
topic: PLC hardware fault after adding I/O module
